name: Import/Export Pipeline
description: Unified multi-format import and export pipeline with AI-assisted merge conflict resolution. Consolidates import (42K) + export (21K) + Verse converter (15K) into a single tool.
author: BiloxiStudios

brains_root.label: Brains Repository Root
brains_root.description: Path to the Brains repository. Use environment variable BRAINS_ROOT or default to current working directory

default_import_format.label: Default Import Format
default_import_format.description: Default format to auto-detect for imports

batch_size.label: Batch Processing Size
batch_size.description: Number of entities to process in each batch

ai_merge_enabled.label: Enable AI-Driven Conflict Resolution
ai_merge_enabled.description: Use LLM-based merge conflict resolution for ambiguous imports

ai_merge_model.label: AI Merge Model
ai_merge_model.description: Model to use for conflict resolution (e.g., gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet)

pdf_page_size.label: PDF Page Size
pdf_page_size.description: Page size for PDF exports (A4, Letter, Legal)

pdf_layout_template.label: PDF Layout Template
pdf_layout_template.description: Path to custom Jinja2 template for PDF layouts

docx_template.label: DOCX Template
docx_template.description: Path to DOCX template with styles for exports

include_images_in_pdf.label: Include Images in PDF
include_images_in_pdf.description: Embed entity portraits and images in PDF exports

include_relationships_in_export.label: Include Relationships
include_relationships_in_export.description: Add relationship sections and cross-references in exports
